rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR - Petition To Transfer To Marin County - (The Original Petition Was Filed By Respondent Gregory Mar On November 16, 2022 In Consolidated Case Ptr-19-302674) - Continued From Mar-14-2023 In D305 Is Rescheduled On Mar-16-2023 At 2:00 Pm In Dept 204 Per Court Order Filed On 1/17/23.
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. Petitioner Gregory Mar's Petition for Transfer of Action is DENIED. Respondents Antoinette Mallette's and Veronica Ligne Mar's request for sanctions is DENIED. Respondents are ordered to lodge with the clerk in Department 204 a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling, as published above, by the time set for this hearing. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the court day before the hearing. Remote appearance is available consistent with San Francisco Superior Court Local Rules, rule 14.1(D). To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
